content: لاَزِم تِقول اِلكَلاَم صَحّ أو اِلناَس مِش هَتِفهَمَك
translations: eng:you have to say the words right or people will not understand you

transcriptions.arabizi: laezim ti'ool ilkalaem sahh 'aw ilnaes mish hatifham|ak
